body.title: Vetinari: receive path — directive intake via bus
body.result: VetinariShim + DirectiveListener (fetch_unseen polling, malformed-envelope-safe); accept_directive() + get_pending_directives() on device; atomic flat-file write; 15 tests
body.intention: I intend that Vetinari can receive a natural-language directive from Akien via comms://vetinari/inbox and persist it to flat-file pending state.
body.description:
Vetinari currently has no receive path (comms() returns pull: False). The autonomous directive vision requires him to accept goals from Akien.

Add a VetinariShim with an IMAP idle_wait listener on comms://vetinari/inbox. On message receipt, parse the envelope body as a directive dict {id, text, from, received_at} and append to ~/.unseen_university/vetinari/pending_directives.json (atomic write). No processing yet — intake only.

**Affected files:** devices/vetinari/shim.py (NEW), devices/vetinari/device.py (add accept_directive(), get_pending_directives()), tests/test_vetinari_intake.py (NEW)
**Design rules:** BaseShim for shim; IMAP via bus/ only; flat-file for pending state (must survive restart); no SQLite
**Scope boundary:** IN — shim skeleton, IMAP listener loop, directive persistence, accept_directive() on device; OUT — decomposition, any processing of the directive
**Completion criteria:** VetinariShim starts without error; send a test envelope to comms://vetinari/inbox; verify pending_directives.json gains the new entry; 5+ tests covering: receive, persist, restart-survives, malformed-envelope-graceful, duplicate-id-handled
